series_metadata.series_description: Record series contain records related to all Department of Public Safety (DPS) Information Technology consultants, which may include, but not limited to: the IT Consultant handbook with signoff, the form located within DAS’ HR-50 Guidelines for Contracted Resources, CJIS security addendum signoff, and the H1B letter to renew a visa.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: six (6) years from last date of service agency ; Electronic: six (6) years from last date of service agency
